AppDescription.message: Odstrani črne trakove iz videoposnetkov na ultraširokih zaslonih (21:9, 32:9, itd.) povsod, vključno z YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video, itd.

ImproveUs.message: Prosimo, povejte nam, kako se lahko izboljšamo prek e-pošte

Off.description: Name of the mode when the extension is disabled and doesn't apply any transformations

PrivacyPolicyText.message: Cenimo vašo zasebnost in spoštujemo EU GDPR. Prosimo, preglejte in sprejmite naš pravilnik o zasebnosti, da začnete uporabljati UltraWide Video.

ReviewUs.message: Prosimo, napišite oceno za UltraWide Video v Chrome spletni trgovini

Stretch.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets stretched horizontally to fill the video element and remove black bars

Zoom.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets zoomed (scaled up, vertically and horizontally) to fill the video element and remove black bars
